rationale: A2-Tool r9 overfit on 50-example × 1500-step narrow corpus dropped hire_sim_lenient to 0.5667 vs 0.8111 baseline. D6.post_mortem_constraint_added_20260417 requires tool weight <1-5% diluted with >=3MB broad data + steps/example <=3. This corpus satisfies: 5% tool byte ratio, 3.2MB total, ~300 steps × batch=8 / ~3250 examples = ~0.7 steps/example.
